chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA C. P. No.S-284 of 2025. DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection ‘A’. 2. For hearing of main case. 25.08.2025 Mr. Riaz Hussain Khoso, advocate a/w petitioner. Mr. Ali Anwar Kandhro, Addl. P. G. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Bhutto, Asstt. A. G a/w SIP/SIO Liaquat Ali of PS Lakhi Ghulam Shah, District Shikarpur. -.-.-.-.-.- The alleged detainee Mst. Gul Naz daughter of Lal Muhammad is present in person. Mr. Haji Ahsan Ahmed Memon, advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of alleged detainee, taken on record. The alleged detainee Mst. Gul Naz present in Court submits that the petitioner has forcibly abducted her and thereby committed zina; however, she prefers to live with her parents. When confronted about statement, the counsel for the petitioner seeks disposal of the petition. Since the alleged detainee has categorically denied to go with petitioner, therefore, this petition is hereby disposed of, leaving the parties at liberty to file proper cases before the Court having jurisdiction in accordance with law. Judge M.Yousuf Panhwar/**
